tribe_description: This cluster consists of busy caregivers who shop with a ‘function-first’ lens. Their writing is brief, upbeat, and grounded in real-world testing—highlighting how well a product fits, lasts, and keeps kids happy, rather than offering technical deep dives.
tribe_definition: A tribe of practical parent purchasers who evaluate products based on what the label suggests. They generally prioritize everyday usefulness, parenting needs.
population_definition: Health-conscious consumers who evaluate supplements, personal care, and wellness products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Hands-on testers of durability and fit

main.text: Ensuring purchases work straight out of the box
Keeping children entertained, safe, and comfortable
Avoiding waste by choosing items that last
Confirming true sizing and good fit

validation_triggers: Noticeable durability after wash or rough use
No ads/in-app purchases or extra costs
Products that clearly delight their children
friction_points: Items arriving with sizing issues or boxy cuts
Products that break quickly under kid use
Limited gameplay depth that leads to fast boredom
Unexpected ads, add-ons, or delivery problems
Poor material feel or hygiene concerns (e.g., odor retention)

implicit_goals.text: Streamline day-to-day family routines with reliable products
Avoid disappointing or unsafe purchases for their children
Maximize enjoyment and developmental benefit per dollar spent

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent who focuses on whether products meet fundamental expectations for their children, such as enjoyment and proper fit. Their reviews are very concise, offering quick confirmation of core qualities to reassure other buyers, indicating a value for straightforward, practical information over detailed analysis.

category_characteristics.Software: This user evaluates software primarily through the lens of how much enjoyment it brings to children, indicating a caregiver or parent perspective focused on kid-friendliness. Their reviews are extremely brief and affirmative, suggesting a motivation to provide quick reassurance rather than detailed analysis. Overall, they value straightforward confirmation of positive child engagement over technical or cost considerations.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is driven by straightforward functionality, emphasizing whether a garment meets the basic expectation of proper sizing. Their one-line, affirmative review indicates a pragmatic, no-nonsense mindset that values brevity and seeks simply to confirm fit for fellow shoppers rather than provide detailed commentary.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a practical parent whose reviews revolve around their child's enjoyment and clear functional benefits such as cost savings and comfort. They write concise, enthusiastic endorsements that focus on immediate satisfaction and straightforward utility rather than in-depth analysis.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a parent who bases their opinions on their child’s enjoyment and writes extremely concise, upbeat endorsements when the game delights their son. Their reviews aim simply to signal that the product brings happiness to their child, prioritizing fun and emotional satisfaction over technical detail or comprehensive evaluation.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is practicality-focused and family-oriented, emphasizing cost savings (avoiding battery purchases) and their child’s enjoyment as key reasons for praise. Their reviews are very brief, positive endorsements aimed at affirming a good, hassle-free purchase rather than providing detailed analysis, suggesting a motivation to quickly share satisfaction without investing much time in writing.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user prioritizes physical comfort and accurate fit, and their reviews stem from an immediate, personal sense of satisfaction. They offer very brief, enthusiastic endorsements rather than detailed analysis, indicating a motivation to quickly affirm a successful purchase and give others simple reassurance.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a practicality-driven parent who evaluates products through the lens of everyday usefulness, comfort, and their educational or developmental benefits for children. Their reviews balance positive observations with candid caveats (e.g., fabric weight, waist fit), suggesting a motivation to give other shoppers nuanced, experience-based guidance rather than blanket praise or criticism.

category_characteristics.Software: This reviewer approaches software from a parent’s perspective, focusing on how an app engages and educates their child. Motivated by observable learning outcomes and developmental benefits, they write reviews to share the positive impact on their child’s curiosity and to guide other caregivers toward products that foster educational growth.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is practicality-oriented and motivated by helping others gauge comfort, fit, and seasonal suitability. They offer concise, balanced observations that combine objective garment details with an explicit awareness of personal body differences, signaling a desire to inform shoppers while acknowledging individual variation.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented pragmatist who values ease-of-use, protection, and organization, especially for items that benefit their children. They write upbeat, straightforward endorsements that highlight practical features (simplicity, durability, compactness) to reassure other parents and everyday users that the product will make life smoother and safer. Their primary motivation is to recommend reliable, hassle-free solutions that fit seamlessly into family routines.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is strongly convenience-oriented and judges software primarily on how effortlessly it fits into familiar routines, praising clear navigation and reduced cognitive load. Their reviews are concise, positive endorsements meant to reassure others that the product minimizes hassle and maintains continuity year over year. They write mainly to highlight ease-of-use and to signal that the software will save users time without requiring major life or workflow adjustments.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is a practicality-oriented, safety-conscious parent who evaluates products through the lens of family and travel needs. Their reviews focus on protection, organization, and portability, offering situational details so other caregivers can judge real-world usefulness. They write concise yet specific endorsements aimed at helping similar users confidently choose reliable, child-friendly items.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is pragmatic and family-focused, buying items that solve an immediate need for their child and reporting back primarily on whether the product functions as promised. Their reviews are brief confirmations centered on reliability, fit, and situational usefulness (e.g., completing a costume or withstanding cold weather), indicating a motivation to reassure other parents that a purchase will work without hassle.

This user is a pragmatic parent who values functionality, ease of use, and reliability—especially when a product directly benefits their child. Their concise reviews spotlight concrete performance factors like quick charging, secure fit, durability, and vivid appearance, providing reassurance that the item solves a problem and delights the user. Motivated by sharing straightforward, experience-based confirmations of utility, they aim to help other caretakers make confident, hassle-free purchase decisions.

category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is function-focused and family-oriented, writing reviews to confirm that a product reliably restores lost utility and brings quick relief. Their concise, positive wording centers on practical results (secure fit, fast charging) and the immediate benefit to loved ones, indicating a motivation to reassure others that a straightforward solution exists for common appliance failures.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is driven by practical functionality and visual authenticity, emphasizing ease of application, durability, and bright, accurate appearance. Their reviews are brief, outcome-focused endorsements meant to reassure others that the product performs reliably and enhances the overall look.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, family-oriented parent who values functional effectiveness and hygiene for their child’s sports gear. They write brief, enthusiastic endorsements when a product quickly and definitively solves a real-world problem, aiming to guide other parents toward practical, time-saving solutions.

category_characteristics.Software: This user’s feedback is succinct and utilitarian, indicating a pragmatic focus on whether the software simply performs its intended function. Their reviews appear motivated by a desire to provide quick confirmation of basic functionality for fellow users, rather than offering in-depth analysis or emotional commentary.
category_characteristics.Health & Personal Care: This user is a pragmatic, family-focused parent who reviews products when they demonstrably solve hygiene or odor issues tied to their child’s active lifestyle. Their motivation is rooted in practical effectiveness and re-purchase behavior; once convinced, they offer succinct, enthusiastic endorsements to steer other caregivers toward proven, hassle-free solutions.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent who evaluates products through the lens of how well they keep their child occupied and make family life—especially travel—easier. Their reviews are informal and candid, highlighting real-world convenience, minor design flaws, and their child’s satisfaction, with an overall emphasis on practical usefulness over technical perfection.

category_characteristics.Software: This reviewer writes from a practical parent’s perspective, primarily valuing whether software keeps their child entertained with minimal hassle. Their tone is casual and humorous, balancing candid critiques of simplicity or annoyance with an overall judgment based on the product’s ability to occupy their child and provide short-term amusement. They aim to help other caregivers gauge real-world usefulness rather than technical quality, favoring concise, experience-based observations over detailed analysis.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This reviewer is family-oriented and evaluates appliances through the lens of real-world travel convenience, especially for keeping children content on the road. They write balanced, experience-based reviews that highlight both functional successes and practical design limitations so other parents can judge day-to-day usability. Their core motivation is to share firsthand insights that help similar family shoppers choose reliable, hassle-free solutions.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent whose reviews center on how products enhance their children’s enjoyment, creativity, and comfort while holding up over time. They provide balanced, experience-based feedback—praising durability and fun factors yet flagging practical drawbacks like server or sizing issues—to guide fellow caregivers toward reliable, family-friendly purchases.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a family-oriented gamer who prioritizes kid-friendly creativity and educational play, assessing whether games engage children while still providing personal enjoyment. Their motivation is to help fellow caregivers choose fun, low-stress experiences that foster imagination.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is family-oriented and writes reviews through the lens of a parent ensuring products work well for their children and household tasks. They value reliability and convenience over technical depth, resulting in concise, experience-driven endorsements or cautions.

Their brief, positive comments signal a motivation to confirm product reliability and express gratitude when their kid is happy, rather than to provide detailed analysis for a broader audience. The user’s core values appear to be child satisfaction, product durability, and the convenience of finding replacements easily online.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is motivated by practical problem-solving and versatility, highlighting how products can serve unexpected functions when official accessories are unavailable. Their reviews are anecdotal and solution-oriented, aiming to help others by sharing creative, real-life use cases and emphasizing adaptability and everyday usefulness.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent who focuses on product accuracy, durability, and fit for their child. category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a parent whose reviews center on their child's enjoyment, using the child’s reaction as the primary yardstick for product quality. category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer appears pragmatic and quality-oriented, primarily driven to confirm that items perform exactly as advertised. member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, value-conscious parent who evaluates products through the lens of everyday functionality, durability and family comfort. category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is a practical, value-conscious parent who focuses on comfort, accurate sizing, and anticipated durability when assessing fashion items for their child. member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent whose reviews center on how well products suit and delight their young daughter. Their tone is generally positive but candid about returns when items don’t meet these practical, child-focused standards.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a parent reviewer motivated primarily by how software entertains and supports their young child’s learning. Their purpose is less about technical assessment and more about affirming child engagement and future developmental benefit.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is a practical, family-oriented shopper whose reviews center on sizing accuracy and how well items suit their child. They write concise, matter-of-fact comments that highlight fit and the ease of returns, aiming to help other parents quickly assess whether a product will work for their children.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent who evaluates products through the lens of immediate usefulness and suitability for specific situations—whether a toy keeps a three-year-old engaged or clothing coordinates well with existing outfits and fits true to size. Their reviews are brief, candid assessments that highlight functional limitations and practical benefits, aiming to help others quickly judge if an item will meet similar everyday needs.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a pragmatic parent who assesses software based on how long it can keep a young child engaged and whether the activities offer meaningful variety. Their reviews are concise and blunt, quickly pointing out limited content or short-lived appeal to warn other caregivers about poor value. category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is motivated by confirming versatile styling and correct sizing, mentioning how the item pairs with multiple outfits and explicitly stating their size to aid similar shoppers. Their reviews are concise and upbeat, aiming mainly to reassure others of fit and aesthetic compatibility rather than provide in-depth critique.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent whose reviews are driven by ensuring products are safe, age-appropriate, and hassle-free for young children. They emphasize practical factors such as durability, fit, absence of ads or extra costs, delivery quality, and educational value, offering candid yet informative feedback to help fellow parents make confident, efficient purchase decisions.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a conscientious parent whose reviews center on toddler enjoyment, developmental value, and the absence of ads or in-app purchases, reflecting a strong protective instinct toward safe, wholesome content. They write experience-based, practical endorsements aimed at helping other caregivers quickly identify simple, educational apps that genuinely engage young children, even when the repetition is personally tiresome. Their motivation is to share trustworthy resources that balance learning and fun while shielding kids from commercial or inappropriate influences.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is a pragmatic, detail-oriented parent who judges clothing primarily on real-world functionality—fit, durability after washing, and condition upon arrival—rather than aesthetics alone. Their reviews aim to warn or reassure fellow shoppers by documenting shipping issues, return experiences, and how garments hold up to active use by children. Overall, they are motivated by quality assurance and the desire to help others avoid inconveniences with sizing or sub-par items.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent of young children who judges products primarily by durability, quality, and how well they serve kids’ needs and abilities. Their concise reviews emphasize real-world performance—fit, ease of use, and child enjoyment—quickly praising items that meet these criteria and warning when they do not. They write chiefly to guide fellow parents toward reliable, value-conscious purchases that will withstand active kid use.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a pragmatic parent who judges video-game items primarily by how well they suit very young children, focusing on durability, age-appropriate ease-of-use, and the kids’ level of engagement. Their concise, matter-of-fact reviews praise good value and reliable quality while warning against flimsy products, signaling a desire to help fellow parents make smart, child-focused purchasing decisions.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This reviewer is pragmatic and family-oriented, emphasizing durability, precise fit, and ease of installation for items used by their child. Their primary motivation is to spare others the frustration of failed purchases by sharing straightforward comparisons between poor and successful products. They write concise, positive endorsements when an item meets their standards of quality and user-friendliness.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is practicality-driven, concentrating on accurate sizing, softness and warmth—especially when purchasing clothing for a child. member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic parent focused on securing reliable, authentic products that work smoothly for family use, especially their children. Their reviews weigh usability, product authenticity, and availability, offering straightforward, comparative feedback to alert others to quality gaps or shopping challenges. They write primarily to help fellow consumers—particularly parents—avoid disappointing purchases and locate trustworthy items.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is motivated by maintaining consistent quality and authenticity in products associated with trusted brands, especially those aimed at children. They focus on functionality and ease-of-use, offering concise but critical feedback when an app fails to meet prior standards or presents usability issues, primarily to caution other users.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is motivated by securing authentic, reliable gaming accessories that keep their family’s play experience smooth and trouble-free. They write succinct, practical endorsements that emphasize brand genuineness, operational quality, and the convenience of finding hard-to-locate items, aiming to reassure other parents or caretakers looking for trustworthy products for their children.

They flatter your bottom and mid-section, while offering you all-around comfort and style. These panties feature a lightweight silky microfiber construction with a flexible four-way stretch that offers comfort while allowing you freedom of movement. They also boast an innovative, no dig-in V-front hipster waistband with narrow elastic for a relaxing fit. Choose from a range of colors and sizes for your ideal fit. These no muffin top panties offer plenty of coverage and lie flat against your skin so you can wear them under any type of bottoms.

Whether you’re a casual weather enthusiast or a full-blown meteorologist, WeatherBug is your best choice.Join millions who depend on WeatherBug for accurate, reliable weather information each and every day!NEW FEATURES• Update to interactive Game Day, Snow & Ski and Cold & Flu lifestyle forecasts• Multi-language Support: Get your weather in English (US), Spanish (Español) and PortugueseTRACK ANY WEATHER CONDITION• Real-Time Pinpoint Weather Forecasts: Get the most accurate and reliable current, feels like, hourly, and 10-day weather forecasts• Enhanced Interactive Radar Map: Visualize weather conditions with over 17 different map layers that you can animate – track storms and hurricanes headed your way!• Spark Lightning Alerts: Your personal lightning detector, Spark gives you minute-by-minute, mile-by-mile lightning strike alerts• Precise Weather Details: Get wind speed and direction, daily pollen info specific to your location, UV (ultraviolet) info, sunrise and sunset times, moon phases, precipitation information for the hour, day, month and year -- plus daily high and lows for humidity and pressure!• Easy Access: See the current temperature directly on your device status bar and vital weather info in your notifications!LARGEST WEATHER NETWORK• Weather forecasts for over 2.6 million locations worldwide• Largest worldwide total lightning detection network• Over 10,000 professional-grade weather stations in the U.S. alone• Live weather & traffic camerasFASTEST WEATHER ALERTS• Get notified of severe weather 50% faster with our exclusive Dangerous Thunderstorm Alerts (like high rain, high winds, microbursts, hail, lightning strikes and tornadoes)• Receive all watches and warnings from NOAA’s National Weather ServiceDEEPER WEATHER INTELLIGENCE • Lifestyle Forecasts: See how the weather will impact your professional sports games, workouts, allergies, chronic pain, gardening and much more -- even find the best resorts to snow and ski• WeatherBug Home: Find out how the weather is impacting your home energy usage given the current weather conditionsCUSTOMIZE YOUR WEATHER • Customizable Widgets: Add important weather information to your Android device home screen with customizable widgets in multiple sizes • Temperature Units: Fahrenheit (°F), Celsius (°C)• Wind Units: MPH, KPH, Knots and MPS• Pressure Units: Inches and millibars (mb)Be prepared. Know Before™. Download the best weather app!
AEBGKGXVZ5BA63TYXCJ5NZGQPGHQ.review_text: my 7-year old has this on his kindle fire hd; he's had it for a while and always lets us know what the weather is for the day.it got him interested in weather, and from there he's gone on to study more about geography and our planet.

AEBGKGXVZ5BA63TYXCJ5NZGQPGHQ.product_description: CLASSIC CHAMPION® STYLE. These men’s joggers offer ultimate lightweight comfort. Made from U.S. grown cotton, these men’s sweatpants are finished with a Champion C logo patch. Pair them with your favorite tee or hoodie for an effortlessly cool fit.
AEBGKGXVZ5BA63TYXCJ5NZGQPGHQ.review_text: Nice lounge-type pants; thin fabric is nice for summer, too cool for a chilly autumn.  I found the waist a bit too tight - but that may just be me!  Overall, a nice pair of comfy slacks.

AEJ537CC7V6EQDWUJOLTFBWM4SVA.product_description: BOOGIIO Nintendo Switch Carrying Case, Hard Shell Travel Carrying Box Case for Nintendo Switch with 10 Game Cards Holders, Portable Pouch for Nintendo Switch Console & Accessories -Black
AEJ537CC7V6EQDWUJOLTFBWM4SVA.review_text: This is great! We took a road trip to visit my parents and the kids had their switches to play with.  I will not allow them to bring it unless they have a case to store it in and this happened to be one of the cases we have.  It is great.  It holds all the games we have so the kids know where the games are.  It has a semi rigid case so that it protects the system and it is small enough to fit into their backpacks.  I highly recommend this item.

AF5PC2LY74LDWSRX3ZCAS72N5I4A.product_description: NBA 2K celebrates 20 years of redefining what sports gaming can be, from best in class gameplay to groundbreaking game modes and an immersive open world “Neighborhood.” All of which can be enjoyed on the go with NBA 2K19, the 1 sports simulation game on Nintendo Switch (Metacritic, 2019). NBA 2K19 continues to push limits as it brings gaming one step closer to real life basketball excitement and culture.  RUN THE NEIGHBORHOOD You won’t want to miss a single day in the updated Neighborhood. Make a name for yourself on the court, at the Under Armour Cages, and during live events on the block. Ball until dawn with new day to night transitions, walk on at the Jordan Rec Center, or get the old Crew back together for exciting 3 on 3 streetball action. MyTEAM Create your very first MyPLAYER card, and ball with LeBron, Kobe, and the rest of your collection in a variety of competitive modes. Introducing the new Unlimited mode, allowing you to pick any five cards from your deck without restrictions and battle against other players online. MyCAREER From neighborhood legend to global phenomenon. The original career story mode returns with an all new, immersive narrative charting your journey from China to the G League and eventually the NBA. Featuring an all star cast, endorsements tied to your popularity, and new team chemistry elements that allow you to dominate the hardwood. Split Joy Con™ Support Take NBA 2K19 anywhere and challenge your friends using the fully supported Split Joy Con™ controls. Enjoy access to all online and offline game modes with no additional console accessories required.
AF5PC2LY74LDWSRX3ZCAS72N5I4A.review_text: purchased a download code for NBA 2k19 and it worked.

AE4NVJNH62NQCSRJAMWGXDNEQIUQ.product_description: It’s time to take a run on the wild side with the incredibly fun and despicably daring Minions! Illumination, Universal, and Gameloft bring you Minion Rush, an endless running game that can be enjoyed offline, anytime! Run through lots of cool locations, dodging devious traps, battling vile villains, and collecting loads of bright, beautiful Bananas!Game FeaturesDressed to ImpressNow that Gru’s gone good, the Minions have a new goal: to become the ultimate Secret Agents! So they’ve created dozens of fun Costumes that don’t just look slick, but have unique skills, such as extra running speed, grabbing more Bananas, or turning you into a Mega Minion!A Wide World of MinionsYou’ll run through crazy locations, from the Anti-Villain League HQ to Vector’s lair, or the ancient past. Each location has its own unique set of obstacles to overcome, so keep your eye(s) peeled! And once you’re ready, you can enter the Top Bananas Room to compete against players from all over your region—or even the world—in an endless running mode to unlock tons of prizes!Offline AdventuresAll this fun can be played offline without Wi-Fi, so you can enjoy the main features of the game anytime, anywhere.________________________________________Privacy Policy: http://www.gameloft.com/en/privacy-noticeTerms of Use: http://www.gameloft.com/en/conditions-of-useEnd-User License Agreement: http://www.gameloft.com/en/eulaDisabling password protection may result in unauthorized purchases. We strongly encourage you to keep password protection turned on if you have children or if others could have access to your device.This game contains advertising for Gameloft’s products or some third parties, which will redirect you to a third-party site. You can disable your device’s ad identifier being used for interest-based advertising in the settings menu of your device. This option can be found in the Settings app > Accounts (Personal) > Google > Ads (Settings and Privacy) > Opt out of interest-based ads.Certain aspects of this game will require the player to connect to the Internet.

But not with GloveStix! They do all the work so you don’t have to.GloveStix are an award-winning, patented odor management system. Unlike ball deodorizers and other odor eliminators, GloveStix don’t just mask unpleasant smells, they neutralize them completely. Simply place GloveStix inside your gloves, shoes, cleats or skates and eliminate harmful moisture in as little as 24 hours.Silver Seal technology infuses the plastic used in GloveStix with silver ions.Each set of GloveStix comes with replaceable deodorizing and moisture absorbing bags to help your gear dry faster. They are lightly scented with plant-based essential oils to keep smells at bay. Simply change your inserts every 3-4 months for optimal freshness.Order your GloveStix today and start neutralizing odors in no time. Just put GloveStix in and get stink out!

AEBNIWQL6CXHYRJWX6UBDPQWEFCA.review_text: Worked perfectly during our last minute drive across Texas this pastThanksgiving. Only an issue. AFA6MMA4HOWHU66OC6YE73JPF6EQ.product_description: Create, explore, survive, repeat. Play Minecraft: Java Edition and Minecraft: Bedrock Edition for Windows, and cross-play with any Minecrafter by simply switching to the edition your friends have! Xbox Live account required to download and install.
AFA6MMA4HOWHU66OC6YE73JPF6EQ.review_text: Pretty fun game. Kids love it. So do I. It’s great for creativity. Survival mode is a challenge. Creative is basically an open play and it lets the kids build and explore without the stress of survival. There are frequent issues with the Minecraft servers causing issues with purchasing add-ons or using the coin package. Highly recommend.

AG6MENO5OO7LRCH27J47ZODEZN6Q.product_description: The DualShock 4 Wireless Controller features familiar controls, and incorporates several innovative features to usher in a new era of interactive experiences. Its definitive analog sticks and trigger buttons have been improved for greater feel and sensitivity. A multi touch, clickable touch pad expands gameplay possibilities, while the incorporated light bar in conjunction with the PlayStation Camera allows for easy player identification and screen adjustment when playing with friends in the same room. The addition of the Share button makes utilizing the social capabilities of the PlayStation 4 as easy as the push of a button. The DualShock 4 Wireless Controller is more than a controller; it's your physical connection to a new era of gaming.

AG6MENO5OO7LRCH27J47ZODEZN6Q.product_description: Charger for Nintendo Switch, YCCTEAM Charger AC Adapter Power Supply 15V 2.6A Fast Charging Kit Compatible with Switch OLED/Switch Dock and Pro Controller (Support TV Mode),Black
AG6MENO5OO7LRCH27J47ZODEZN6Q.review_text: Really useful AC adapter. I don't remember which device we bought it for. What is interesting though is that my teenage son figured out that it could be used to charge our floor police mop when the battery for that motorised mop died and we didn't have and could not find a floor police mop charger to buy since Floor Police.com does not sell chargers separately if they forgot to send one with the mop.  I am sure this device which we purchased from Amazon.com can be used for many other devices.

AG6MENO5OO7LRCH27J47ZODEZN6Q.product_description: Join Kirby in an unforgettable journey through a mysterious world in a 3D platforming adventure Float off on an all-new adventure as the powerful puffball, Kirby. Explore in 3D stages as you discover a mysterious world with abandoned structures from a past civilization—like a shopping mall?! Copy enemies’ abilities like the new Drill and Ranger and use them to attack, explore your surroundings, and save the kidnapped Waddle Dees from the ferocious Beast Pack alongside the mysterious Elfilin. Hope you’re hungry for an unforgettable adventure! Get a mouthful of real-world objects for all-new, powerful transformations Feeling hungry? Kirby can inhale real-world objects and transform using Mouthful Mode! Why get one drink from a vending machine when you can swallow the whole thing? Then, use your boxy body to shoot out cans at baddies. Consume a car to gain some wheels and slam through walls. Sit back and take it all in…literally. Join up with a pointy partner, Bandana Waddle Dee, in co-op play Pass a Joy-Con controller to a buddy to play as the spear-wielding Bandana Waddle Dee and help each other explore and battle through this colorful world. While Kirby can float and inhale enemies, Bandana Waddle Dee can spin and stab with his sturdy spear. Find friendship in this forgotten world and save the Waddle Dees! Float over obstacles and fight through enemies on your way to each stage’s goal as you slash, poke, freeze, and hammer using Kirby’s copy abilities. The tough puff is truly put to the test in dynamic boss battles that will keep you dancing about the arena. Choose from two difficulty modes for either a light, breezy adventure or a more challenging experience. HAL Laboratory, Inc. / Nintendo. Kirby and Nintendo Switch are trademarks of Nintendo. Nintendo.

AHBMVVWI7KZ43KLQEP6KBMA2UCSQ.product_description: Welcome to Homescapes! Help Austin the butler bring warmth and comfort back to his wonderful family's mansion. Come on in—adventures await you from the moment you walk in the door! Beat colorful match-3 levels to renovate and decorate rooms in the mansion, unlocking ever more chapters in the exciting family story along the way! What are you waiting for? Make yourself at home!The game features:● Unique gameplay: help Austin renovate the house by swapping and matching pieces!● Interior design: you decide what the house will look like.● Exciting match-3 levels: tons of fun, featuring unique boosters and explosive combinations!● A huge, beautiful mansion: discover all the secrets it holds!● Fantastic characters: watch them live their lives and interact with each other in the in-game social network.● A cute pet: meet а naughty and fluffy cat.● Invite your Facebook friends to help you create your own cozy atmosphere in the house!Homescapes is free to play, though some in-game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this option, simply turn it off in your device's Restrictions menu.Questions? Contact our Tech Support by sending an email to homescapes@playrix.com or check our Web Support Portal: https://plrx.me/IXKKoAp9sh

AHBMVVWI7KZ43KLQEP6KBMA2UCSQ.product_description: Recommended as a miracle for better sleep! Features ambient sounds of the environment that will help you relax during the day and sleep great at night. Download White Noise Lite for FREEDo you have trouble going to sleep? Are you traveling on a plane and need a quick power nap? Does your newborn baby wake up in the middle of the night? There are numerous benefits to using White Noise:• Helps you sleep by blocking distractions• Relaxes and reduces stress• Pacifies fussy and crying babies• Increases focus while enhancing privacy• Soothes headaches and migraines• Masks tinnitus (ringing of the ears)Even when you’re asleep, your brain is constantly scanning and listening for sounds. If it’s too quiet, unwanted noises such as faucet drips or police sirens can interrupt your sleep. White Noise generates sounds over a wide range of frequencies, masking those noise interruptions, so you can not only fall asleep, but stay asleep.SOUND CATALOGAir Conditioner, Airplane, Amazon, Beach Waves, Boat, Cars, Cat Purring, Chimes, City Streets, Clock, Clothes Dryer, Crickets, Crowd, Drip, Fan, Fire, Frogs, Hair Dryer, Heartbeat, Blue Noise, Brown Noise, Pink Noise, Violet Noise, White Noise, Ocean Waves, Car Rain, Light Rain, Heavy Rain, Extreme Rain, Rain Storm, Shower, Sprinkler, Stream, Tibetan Bowl, Thunder, Train, Vacuum, Washer, Water, WindAPPLICATION FEATURES• 40+ perfectly looped sounds with additional free sounds from the White Noise Market at http://whitenoisemarket.com/• Create new soundscapes by mixing multiple noises together like a DJ with support for adjusting volume, balance, and pitch of each individual sound in the mix• Full screen digital clock with multiple colors and brightness controls makes it the perfect companion for any nightstand• Advanced alarm and timer system that slowly fades audio in and out so you awake naturally feeling more refreshed• On-screen media player and volume controls with swipe gesture support for navigating sound collection• Star favorite sounds and mixes in the sound catalog for quick access using the Favorite view• Designed to work on all Android-based phones and tablets• Advanced Settings let you prevent interruptions such as notifications, tweak buffer size for optimal playback, adjust sound volume, balance, pitch, custom alarm snooze times, and moreDR. OZ SHOW: 13 Miracles of 2013"Revolutionary Sound App!"AMAZING ANDROID APPS - Book by Daniel A. Begun"White Noise can instantly transform a chaotic environment into a calm oasis."THE WASHINGTON POST: Smartphone Puts Newborn to Sleep "For the next four months, the infant slept with his father's phone in his crib and White Noise tuned to 'air conditioner.' The monotonous buzz kept the baby sleeping soundly and his parents happy."CNET: Apps that can improve your life“Trouble falling asleep at night? A little White Noise might do the trick.”CUSTOMER REVIEWS“I use it with Bose headphones while traveling on long flights around the country. It helps me forget I’m in coach, catch a few hours’ sleep and arrive feeling better than one could expect.”"We have an eight week old, and he’s slept with White Noise every night since birth. He’s the happiest kid on the block."“The sounds in this app rival those of expensive white noise generators you would find at Brookstone or Sharper Image. Great work!”ANDROID PERMISSIONSWAKE_LOCK: Used by alarms to wake device when activatedDISABLE_KEYGUARD: Used by alarms to unlock deviceINTERNET: Used to provide web, news, and adsWRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE: Downloaded soundsREAD_NETWORK_STATE: Checks if web availableUPGRADE WHITE NOISEUpgrade to the full version for background audio and no ads!CONTACT USLike us on Facebook at http://www.facebook.com/tmsoftFollow us on Twitter at http://twitter.com/tmsoftVisit our website at http://www.tmsoft.com/white-noise/

AHBMVVWI7KZ43KLQEP6KBMA2UCSQ.product_description: The Jr. Tyette tap shoe is the number one choice for a beginner tapper. Comes in shiny black patent leather, caramel PU leather or white PU leather. Adorable ribbon tie and star printed cotton lining will inspire your little dancer to have Broadway sized dreams. Features foam padded footbed, collar and Achilles notch for added comfort and security. Introductory tappers will take their first steps with confidence in the Jr. Tyette. Salvatore Capezio was born in 1871 in Muro Lucano, Italy. Uninterested in following in his father's footsteps as a construction engineer, he became an artist of his own right, a cobbler. In 1887, at the age of 17, he opened his shop on Broadway and 39th Street, diagonally across from the old Metropolitan Opera House in New York City. Soon, the shop became a meeting place for dancers who would stop by to discuss their needs and to get a pair of his shoes. As Capezio's popularity grew, dancers from around the world made it a point to visit him and purchase his shoes.  The innovation of the products that Salvatore Capezio created and the camaraderie he shared with the dancers molded the direction that his company would follow. In this image, the Capezio brand was established to promote and recognize ongoing achievements and participation in dance.  Capezio products remain in the forefront in quality and in technological advances with innovations like the split-sole, the stretch-insert, the Dansneaker and the Tapsneaker. Capezio believes that their success is dependent upon the individual commitment of each customer to continually set new standards of creativity and performance, while preserving a reputation for dependability and distinction. Capezio pledges their support and dedication to the advancement of dance, theater and recreation in communities worldwide.

Your child will keep an eye out for rescue alerts, then go on rescue missions to the Bay, the Ice Fields, and Yumi’s Farm! There are different rescues for each of the seven pups with a variety of fun mechanics, including swipe, tap, tilt, and drawing circles. Rescues feature new tools and vehicles for each pup! The app also includes an awards screen with over 30 awards, tutorials for each game, a parents screen and curriculum guide. PAW Patrol: Pups to the Rescue collects personal user data as well as non-personal user data (including aggregated data). User data collection is in accordance with applicable law, such as COPPA. User data may be used, for example, to respond to user requests; enable users to take advantage of certain features and services; personalize content and advertising; and manage and improve Nickelodeon's services. For more information regarding Nickelodeon’s use of personal user data, please visit the Nickelodeon Group Privacy Policy below. Our Privacy Policy is in addition to any terms, conditions or policies agreed to between you and Amazon, and Nickelodeon and its affiliated entities are not responsible for Amazon's collection or use of your personal user data and information. Additionally, this App may use “local notifications.” Local notifications are sent directly from the App to your device (you don’t need to be connected to the Internet) and may be used to notify you of new content or events within your App, among other reasons. Use of this app is subject to the Nickelodeon End User License Agreement. PAW Patrol: Pups to the Rescue offers in-app purchases and charges real money for additional in-app content. You may lock out the ability to purchase in-app content by adjusting your device’s settings. For users residing in the EU, PAW Patrol: Pups to the Rescue may include the use of persistent identifiers for game management purposes and installation of this app constitutes your permission to such usage of persistent identifiers for all users on your device. AEA75CM2MZSOIFUSKFJYZQPFTJNQ.product_description: THE PERFECT APP FOR PRESCHOOLERS Discover hours of creative, interactive play with 40+ award-winning games in one app! Little ones aged 2-5 build, create, and pretend with thoughtfully-designed games that spark curiosity. *** Winner of a Parents' Choice Gold Award, Webby's Nomination, Academics' Choice Smart Media Award, Kidscreen Award, and a W3 Mobile App Design Award. Featured in the New York Times, Guardian, and USA Today. ***MEET SAGO MINI PALS AND CREATE YOUR OWN CHARACTERSExplore outer space, meet some dinosaur friends, build a robot, become a superhero, serve customers at a diner, and more – all in one whimsical world. There are tons of Sago Mini pals to play with, including your little one’s own custom characters! IMAGINATIVE PLAY & SKILL-BUILDING ACTIVITIESKids are free to explore and play their way... the only limit is their imagination! Open-ended play means there are no rules to follow, and how your child engages with the games is completely up to them. Delight in activities that encourage self-expression, empathy, and confidence…perfect for your child’s growing mind! SUPER-SAFE, POSITIVE SCREENTIME COPPA and KidSafe-certified and no in-app purchases or ads for subscribers, Sago Mini World provides digital entertainment parents can feel good about. Designed for intuitive play, preschoolers can confidently explore Sago Mini World all on their own. (But hey, it’s fun to join in with your little one from time to time!) FEATURES • Unlimited access to hundreds of activities, all in one kid-friendly app• Play pre-downloaded games offline without WiFi or internet • Updated monthly with new content, games, and surprises• Use one subscription across multiple devices for easy family sharing• Members get early first access to all new games and releases• Perfect for kids aged 2-5• COPPA and PRIVO-certified – safe and easy for toddlers• No third-party advertising or in-app purchases for subscribers• Makes a perfect gift for curious kidsSubscription DetailsNew subscribers will have access to a free trial at the time of sign-up. Users who don’t wish to continue their membership past the trial should cancel before the seven days are up so they aren’t charged.• At each renewal date (whether monthly or annually), your account will automatically be charged the subscription fee. If you’d prefer not to be automatically charged, just head to your Account Settings and turn off ‘Auto Renew’.• Your subscription can be cancelled at any time, without fee or penalty. (Note: you won’t be refunded for any unused portion of your subscription.)• For more information, check out our FAQs.• If you need help, have questions, or want to say ‘hi’, get in touch at worldsupport@sagomini.com PRIVACY POLICYSago Mini is committed to protecting your privacy and the privacy of your children. We adhere to the strict guidelines set forth by COPPA (Children’s Online Privacy Protection Rule), which ensures the protection of your child’s information online. Read our full privacy policy here:Privacy Policy: https://sagomini.link/PrivacyPolicyABOUT SAGO MINISago Mini is an award-winning company devoted to the power of play. We make apps and toys that seed imagination, grow wonder, and bring thoughtful design to life. We believe that laughter helps kids learn and that the best things in life start with play. For kids. For parents. For giggles.Instagram: @sagominiFacebook: Sago MiniEmail: hello@sagomini.com

AEA75CM2MZSOIFUSKFJYZQPFTJNQ.product_description: An award-winning educational, creative play app, Trucks has 5 engaging activities: carwash, tow truck, garbage and recycling, bulldozer and dump truck and a car and truck parade. Trucks teaches sequencing, sorting and problem solving. AWARDS: Parents’ Choice Silver Award, Children’s Technology Review Editor’s Choice Award. AGES: 2-6CATEGORY: Play ACTIVITIES CARWASH: Roll a car through the mud and into a carwash! Clean the car withbrushes, soap and bubbles. Squirt water jets to rinse off your car then dry it off. TOW TRUCK: Help fix a flat tire. Use a tow truck to take a car to the tire shop. Raisethe car up to a platform, change the tires and choose the hubcap you want! GARBAGE & RECYCLING: Clean up the street and sort items into garbage, compostand recycling bins. Learn about garbage and recycling and earn a “Green Score.” Dump the correct bin into the garbage, recycling and compost trucks. BULLDOZER & DUMP TRUCK: Use the dump truck to create a pile of dirt, then take itaway with a bulldozer. CAR & TRUCK PARADE: Play with a fire truck, ambulance, ice cream truck, cement truck, police car and more. Control their speed with by touching the red, yellow and green signal lights. MUSICInstrumental music recorded especially for this app with guitar and drums includes popular nursery rhymes: - Wheels on the Bus- Hurry Hurry Drive the Fire Truck- I’ve Been Working on the Railroad- If You’re Happy and You Know It- Yankee Doodle- When the Saints Go Marching In ABOUT DUCK DUCK MOOSE (A wholly-owned subsidiary of Khan Academy)Duck Duck Moose, an award-winning creator of educational mobile apps for families, is a passionate team of engineers, artists, designers, and educators. Founded in 2008, the company has created 21 top-selling titles and has received 21 Parents’ Choice Awards, 18 Children’s Technology Review Awards, 12 Tech with Kids’ Best Pick App Awards, and a KAPi award for “Best Children’s App” at the International Consumer Electronics Show. Khan Academy is a nonprofit with a mission to provide a free, world-class education for anyone, anywhere. Duck Duck Moose is now part of the Khan Academy family. Like all Khan Academy offerings, all Duck Duck Moose apps are now free, without ads or subscriptions. We rely on our community of volunteers and donors. Get involved today at www.duckduckmoose.com/about.We’d love to hear from you! Visit us at www.duckduckmoose.com or drop us a line at support@duckduckmoose.com.

AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.product_description: Product Description In the Cars Race-O-Rama video game, players get to race against new characters through action-packed tracks to win the Race-O-Rama trophy as their own personalized Lightning McQueen. Join Lightning McQueen in Radiator Springs as he prepares his academy of student racers for the Race-O-Rama competition. Lightning finds out that Chick Hicks has his own set of academy student racers who don’t always compete fairly. These student racers are preparing to race in the same competitions in order to propel Chick Hick’s academy to the #1 spot. The races take place at various tracks from the beaches, into the cities and off to the Baja desert. Along the way, racers are upgrading their abilities and customizing their look. The finale consists of a fully modified, ultimate Lightning McQueen racing against a fully modified Chick Hicks for the Race-O-Rama trophy. Let the race begin! Amazon.com In the Cars Race-O-Rama video game, players get to race against new characters either by themselves or with a friend, through action-packed tracks to win the Race-O-Rama trophy as their own personalized Lightning McQueen. Join Lightning McQueen in Radiator Springs as he prepares his academy of student racers for the Race-O-Rama competition. .caption { font-family: Verdana, Helvetica neue, Arial, serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; } ul.indent { list-style: inside disc; text-indent: -15px; } table.callout { font-family: verdana; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1. 3em; } td.vgoverview { height: 125px; background: #9DC4D8 url(https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/electronics/detail-page/callout-bg.png) repeat-x; border-left: 1px solid #999999; border-right: 1px solid #999999; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; width: 250px; font-family: verdana; font-size: 12px; } Story Lightning finds out that Chick Hicks has his own set of academy student racers who don't always compete fairly. These student racers are preparing to race in the same competitions in order to propel Chick Hick's academy to the #1 spot. The races take place at various tracks from the beaches, into the cities and off to the Baja desert. Along the way, racers are upgrading their abilities and customizing their look. The finale consists of a fully modified, ultimate Lightning McQueen racing against a fully modified Chick Hicks for the Race-O-Rama trophy. Let the race begin. .caption { font-family: Verdana, Helvetica neue, Arial, serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; } ul.indent { list-style: inside disc; text-indent: -15px; } table.callout { font-family: verdana; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1. 3em; } td.vgoverview { height: 125px; background: #9DC4D8 url(https://images-na.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/G/01/electronics/detail-page/callout-bg.png) repeat-x; border-left: 1px solid #999999; border-right: 1px solid #999999; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; padding-bottom: 10px; width: 250px; font-family: verdana; font-size: 12px; } New Characters There are over 30 playable characters of which 15 are brand new; Doc Hudson academy of student racers, Chick Hicks academy of student racers, Motor Co Pit Crew, Not Chuck, Guido, Tater, Tater Jr., Bubba, Trophy Girl, Chick Hicks Pit Crew, Doc Hudson Pit Crew, Vin Racer along with major boss characters who are Chick Hick’s protégés; El Machismo, Candice and Stinger. New Mini-games Experience a vast world of new mini games based in the Pixar universe and elsewhere. These include: Mack Track Challenge based off of the Mattel toy, three different games based on Disney Pixar’s Cars Toons episodes (El Materdor, Mater the Greater, & Tokyo Mater), plus many new original games like Photo Op, Auto Cross, Tractor Stampede, and Transporter. A new Lightning McQueen adventure. View larger . Key Game Features New Customization Options – Customize your world by customizing your cars. Modify paint color, wheels & rims, different hood options, side skirts, rear bumpers and spoilers. New Customization Options – Customize your world by customizing your cars. Modify paint color, wheels & rims, different hood options, side skirts, rear bumpers and spoilers. New Characters - Game features 15 new playable characters to the Cars franchise. New Characters - Game features 15 new playable characters to the Cars franchise. New Worlds of Racing – Experience eight racing environments, four of which are completely brand new; Radiator Springs Speedway, Santa Carburera which takes you to the beaches, Motoropolis City where you can experience street racing and Autovia which gives you off road racing in the desert. AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.review_text: This game is just ok.  My 5 year old doesn't love it.  He likes the monster truck or pac man better.

AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.product_description: With these jumbo Pen Styluses, you can use your DS/DSi/DSi XL touch screens to their fullest potential. The jumbo styluses acts to resist cramping in your hand as you play. Enjoy the comfort of using a normal sized pen with your DS/DSi/DSi XL. Since we include three pen styluses, even if you lose one, you still have two left, so you’re never with out the right gear for your DS/DSi/DSi XL adventures. The peace of mind that you have extra pen styluses make this a must have product for any DS/DSi/DSi XL owner. The Jumbo Touch Pen Set is very useful. We also include three traditional styluses for your convenience, giving a total of six styluses.
AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.review_text: I was surprised by the quality of these given the inexpensive price tag.  Perfect for my kids nintendo ds' as we are always searching for the pens.  Highly recommended!

AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.product_description: DSi XL Screen Guard Protective Seal
AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.review_text: This was our 2nd attempt at a screen protector for my son's ds.  The first one was horrible.  I was pleasantly surprised with this one.  Easy to install, a perfect fit and good quality.  Highly recommended!

AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.product_description: KIRJAUDU Women Letter Print Sweatshirt Long Sleeve Cute Heart Elbow Patch Pullover Tops
AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.review_text: Ordered a medium and fits as expected.  Soft and light weight.  Very happy with this purchase!

AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.product_description: High back with adjustable elastic suspenders, zipper fly, triple-stitched seams, bib pocket with snap closure, utility pockets, logo snaps and ankle to knee leg zippers. woven carhartt brandmark label on bib pocket.
AH5RGCVOBY4AFL7SBRRMP7PMXWHQ.review_text: Very warm and perfect fit for my little girl.  Good purchase!

AEIQFE3F6T6E7XX4IZYNBHMYOWUA.product_description: Dentist While everyone hates going to the dentist, most people enjoy being a dentist. Now you can play the role without the pain and mess. Just make full use of your fancy imagination and have fun! Introduce you to a fascinating application for kids!While everyone hates going to the dentist, most people enjoy being a dentist. Now you can play the role without the pain and mess. Do teeth cleanings, extractions, fillings and even teeth whitening treatments. You will have all of the tools you need to play dentist. Just designed for kids with Yo Gabba Gabba! in dental clinic.Thanks for download and rate us...Thank you for your attentionUnofficial free fan app. Please rate this app 5 stars! *** Optimized for tablet=========================================================If you have any problem about this application or infringement , please contact us
AEIQFE3F6T6E7XX4IZYNBHMYOWUA.review_text: We downloaded this app because we enjoy the other Yo Gabba Gabba apps, but they have disappeared from our devices.  This is obviously not produced by the same company.  The cleaning is pretty sketchy (some teeth appear clean, but aren't so you must try every tool on every tooth until you find the one that is still "dirty") and it's not very user friendly.  Meh.

AEIQFE3F6T6E7XX4IZYNBHMYOWUA.product_description: Get Closer To The Action With The DUALSHOCK 3 Wireless Controller The DUALSHOCK 3 wireless controller for the PlayStation 3 system provides the most intuitive game play experience with pressure sensors in each action button and the inclusion of the highly sensitive SIXAXIS motion sensing technology. Each hit, crash and explosion is more realistic when the user feels the rumble right in the palm of their hand. It can even detect natural movements for real-time and high precision interactive play, acting as a natural extension of the user's body. DUALSHOCK 3 utilizes Bluetooth technology for wireless game play and the controller's USB cable to seamlessly and automatically charge the controller through the PlayStation 3 at anytime. By integrating all of these features into the popular PlayStation controller design, the DUALSHOCK 3 will further enhance the advanced game play experience only available on the PlayStation 3 system. Pressure-Sensitive Buttons. Feel the controller vibrate with each hit, crash or explosion. SIXAXIS Highly Sensitive Motion Technology Your natural movements become part of the action. And the controller becomes a natural extension of your body. The SIXAXIS motion-sensing system allows users to maneuver the controller itself. With this system, sensors read when a player angles, tilts, thrusts, or pulls the controller, all in real-time and with high precision. And it's available in both the SIXAXIS wireless controller and the DUALSHOCK 3 wireless controller. Bluetooth Technology No wires. With the DUALSHOCK 3's Bluetooth technology you can play completely untethered. Charging Charge the DUALSHOCK 3 with the PlayStation 3 system using the controller's USB cable. And you can even plug it in during gameplay, so you'll never miss a beat.
AEIQFE3F6T6E7XX4IZYNBHMYOWUA.review_text: We purchased two controllers.  They both seem to be a genuine Sony product and operate smoothly.  We were glad to find these as it's getting difficult to find them in stores in my area.  My sons were excited to have new controllers for our PS3.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity
